mechanism_narrative: A 5-month growth acceleration in the US GDP signals an expansion in aggregate demand that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day forward returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns in > 50% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a labor market contraction that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in > 70% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.005 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month growth acceleration in the US GDP and a 1-month rise in housing starts signals an expansion in aggregate demand that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 5-day forward returns in > 70% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in industrial production and a 2-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in > 80% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.005 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a labor market contraction that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative 5-day forward returns in > 70% of instances, or the signal's rank IC remains below 0.005 over any 1-year rolling window.
